sourcesContent:
import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { Container, Paper, Typography, Box, Button, Grid, Table, TableBody, TableCell, TableContainer, TableHead, TableRow, Chip, IconButton, Dialog, DialogTitle, DialogContent, DialogActions, TextField } from '@mui/material'; import { Security as SecurityIcon, Add as AddIcon, Delete as DeleteIcon, Visibility as ViewIcon, Refresh as RefreshIcon } from '@mui/icons-material'; const CscaManager = () => { const [certificates, setCertificates] = useState([ { id: 1, name: 'Marty Root CA', country: 'UTO', expiry: '2035-01-01', status: 'active' }, { id: 2, name: 'Marty Intermediate CA', country: 'UTO', expiry: '2030-06-15', status: 'active' } ]); const [openDialog, setOpenDialog] = useState(false); const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false); const handleRefresh = async () => { setLoading(true); // TODO: Implement API call await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 500)); setLoading(false); }; return ( CSCA Management Country Signing Certification Authority Management Common Name Country Expiry Date Status Actions {certificates.map((cert) => ( {cert.name} {cert.country} {cert.expiry} ))}
setOpenDialog(false)} maxWidth="sm" fullWidth> Import CSCA Certificate ); }; export default CscaManager;
